response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development with relevant technologies like TypeScript, Node.js, and React. They have worked on various projects that demonstrate their ability to design, develop, and maintain complex applications.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies
Strong experience with full-stack development and relevant technologies
Demonstrated ability to work on complex projects and contribute to architecture decisions
concerns: Some technologies mentioned in the job description, like Nest.js and Vitest, are not explicitly mentioned in the resume
No direct mention of experience with AI agent development or MCP
Limited information about experience with cloud platforms beyond Docker

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit mention of some required technologies
